category_sources: Official Sidero/Talos docs present talosctl as the Talos Linux CLI for installing and managing Talos Linux clusters; source_facts.description says it manages Kubernetes nodes created by Talos.
display_name_sources: Official Sidero documentation page title and heading use talosctl; source_facts.name is talosctl.
docs_sources: Official Sidero documentation has a dedicated talosctl getting started page and a CLI reference section.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/siderolabs/talos; repo not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official docs label talosctl as the Talos Linux CLI; source_facts.description identifies out-of-band management of Talos-created Kubernetes nodes.
